Package org.apache.juneau.junit.bct

Class BctConfiguration.Defaults

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.junit.bct.BctConfiguration.Defaults
Enclosing class:
BctConfiguration
public static class BctConfiguration.Defaults extends Object
Holder for @Value-resolved BCT default sort flags.

Constructed by BctConfiguration.defaults() via BeanInstantiator; both fields are populated by @Value annotations whose SVL expressions inline the canonical BctConfiguration.BCT_SORT_MAPS and BctConfiguration.BCT_SORT_COLLECTIONS property names as string literals (per the project-wide rule that every @Value expression is a fully self-contained string literal — no concatenation with Java constants). The constants remain the canonical reference for external callers (Listifiers, BctConfigExtension, and the BctConfiguration.set/get helpers).

  • Method Details

    • isSortMaps

      public boolean isSortMaps()
      Returns the resolved Bct.sortMaps default.
      Returns:
      true when the BctConfiguration.BCT_SORT_MAPS property is set to a truthy value, false otherwise.

    • isSortCollections

      public boolean isSortCollections()
      Returns the resolved Bct.sortCollections default.
      Returns:
      true when the BctConfiguration.BCT_SORT_COLLECTIONS property is set to a truthy value, false otherwise.
